title: What the City Said vs. What the Ledgers Say
content:
# What the City Said vs. What the Ledgers Say

The working version for the novel keeps the grain-bell timing dispute visible as public confusion, not as a solved footnote. The latest generated synthesis stays below as the evidence-backed baseline.

- Treat the prime-versus-terce contradiction as a queue-management problem the characters can feel.
- Keep merchant-hoarding talk in dialogue and rumor, never in omniscient narration.
- Use the blue-lantern shrine story for tone, not confirmation.
